children.heading: Determination under formula
children.label: 1 Determination under formula
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), the Secretary shall determine the amount of the allotment required in for a State for a fiscal year in accordance with the following formula:section 300x of this titleAAXU

children.label: A
children.text: the amount appropriated under for allotments under for the fiscal year involved; andsection 300x–9(a) of this titlesection 300x of this title

children.label: B
children.text: an amount equal to 1.5 percent of the amount referred to in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Determination of term “U”
children.label: 3 Determination of term “U”
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), the term “U” means the sum of the respective terms “X” determined for the States under paragraph (4).

children.label: i
children.text: the term “P”, as determined for the State involved under paragraph (5); and

children.label: ii
children.text: the factor determined under paragraph (8) for the State; and

children.label: i
children.text: 0.4; and

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to an amount determined for the State in accordance with the following formula:1−.35AR%P%

children.label: i
children.text: an amount equal to the product of 0.107 and the number of individuals in the State who are between 18 and 24 years of age (inclusive);

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to the product of 0.166 and the number of individuals in the State who are between 25 and 44 years of age (inclusive);

children.label: iii
children.text: an amount equal to the product of 0.099 and the number of individuals in the State who are between 45 and 64 years of age (inclusive); and

children.label: iv
children.text: an amount equal to the product of 0.082 and the number of individuals in the State who are 65 years of age or older.

children.label: B
children.text: With respect to data on population that is necessary for purposes of making a determination under subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall use the most recent data that is available from the Secretary of Commerce pursuant to the decennial census and pursuant to reasonable estimates by such Secretary of changes occurring in the data in the ensuing period.

children.label: A
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (4), the term “R%”, except as provided in subparagraph (D), means the percentage constituted by the ratio of the amount determined under subparagraph (B) for the State involved to the amount determined under subparagraph (C).

children.label: i
children.text: the most recent 3-year arithmetic mean of the total taxable resources of the State, as determined by the Secretary of the Treasury; divided by

children.label: ii
children.text: the factor determined under paragraph (8) for the State.

children.label: C
children.text: The amount determined under this subparagraph is the sum of the respective amounts determined for the States under subparagraph (B) (including the District of Columbia).

children.label: i
children.text: In the case of the District of Columbia, for purposes of paragraph (4), the term “R%” means the percentage constituted by the ratio of the amount determined under clause (ii) for such District to the amount determined under clause (iii).

children.label: I
children.text: the most recent 3-year arithmetic mean of total personal income in such District, as determined by the Secretary of Commerce; divided by

children.label: II
children.text: the factor determined under paragraph (8) for the District.

children.label: iii
children.text: The amount determined under this clause is the sum of the respective amounts determined for the States (including the District of Columbia) by making, for each State, the same determination as is described in clause (ii) for the District of Columbia.

children.heading: Determination of term “P%”
children.label: 7 Determination of term “P%”
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (4), the term “P%” means the percentage constituted by the ratio of the term “P” determined under paragraph (5) for the State involved to the sum of the respective terms “P” determined for the States.

children.label: A
children.text: The factor determined under this paragraph for the State involved is a factor whose purpose is to adjust the amount determined under clause (i) of paragraph (4)(A), and the amounts determined under each of subparagraphs (B)(i) and (D)(ii)(I) of paragraph (6), to reflect the differences that exist between the State and other States in the costs of providing comprehensive community mental health services to adults with a serious mental illness and to children with a serious emotional disturbance.

children.label: B
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (C), the factor determined under this paragraph and in effect for the fiscal year involved shall be determined according to the methodology described in the report entitled “Adjusting the Alcohol, Drug Abuse and Mental Health Services Block Grant Allocations for Poverty Populations and Cost of Service”, dated , and prepared by Health Economics Research, a corporation, pursuant to a contract with the National Institute on Drug Abuse.March 30, 1990

children.label: C
children.text: The factor determined under this paragraph for the State involved may not for any fiscal year be greater than 1.1 or less than 0.9.

children.label: i
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary, after consultation with the Comptroller General, shall in accordance with this section make a determination for each State of the factor that is to be in effect for the State under this paragraph. The factor so determined shall remain in effect through fiscal year 1994, and shall be recalculated every third fiscal year thereafter.October 1, 1992

children.label: ii
children.text: After consultation with the Comptroller General, the Secretary shall, through publication in the Federal Register, periodically make such refinements in the methodology referred to in subparagraph (B) as are consistent with the purpose described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Minimum allotments for States
children.label: b Minimum allotments for States
children.text: With respect to fiscal year 2000, and subsequent fiscal years, the amount of the allotment of a State under shall not be less than the amount the State received under such section for fiscal year 1998.section 300x of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an amount equal to the amounts reserved under paragraph (3) for the fiscal year; and

children.label: i
children.text: the civilian population of the territory, as indicated by the most recently available data; divided by

children.label: ii
children.text: the aggregate civilian population of the territories of the United States, as indicated by such data.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount determined under paragraph (1) for the territory for the fiscal year;

children.label: C
children.text: with respect to fiscal years 1993 and 1994, an amount equal to 20.6 percent of the amount received by the territory from allotments made pursuant to this part for fiscal year 1992.

children.heading: Reservation of amounts
children.label: 3 Reservation of amounts
children.text: The Secretary shall each fiscal year reserve for the territories of the United States 1.5 percent of the amounts appropriated under for allotments under for the fiscal year.section 300x–9(a) of this titlesection 300x of this title

children.heading: Availability of data on population
children.label: 4 Availability of data on population
children.text: With respect to data on the civilian population of the territories of the United States, if the Secretary determines for a fiscal year that recent such data for purposes of paragraph (1)(B) do not exist regarding a territory, the Secretary shall for such purposes estimate the civilian population of the territory by modifying the data on the territory to reflect the average extent of change occurring during the ensuing period in the population of all territories with respect to which recent such data do exist.

children.heading: Applicability of certain provisions
children.label: 5 Applicability of certain provisions
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a), the term “State” does not include the territories of the United States.
